The contact owns a 2022 GMC Canyon. The contact stated while driving approximately 70 MPH, the vehicle started to shake and vibrate from the front tires. Additionally, the steering wheel and steering column were also vibrating. The contact stated no warning light was illuminated.

narrative.headline: What 2022 Gmc Canyon owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 23 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Electrical System (43% of reports).
